result.stdout:
usage: dotnet PourOver.dll [Options]... [--] FILE.csv

Options are:
-L, --culture CULTURE   Specify culture (e.g., en-US)
-h, --help              Show this message and exit
-b, --ignore-blank      Ignore blank field
-v, --verbose           Be verbose
-V, --version           Show version and exit
